title: Jelly Babies and Stuff
description: Jelly Babies and Stuff is a mod that you will grow adorable plants to get some Jelly Babies to maybe eat, and in the future more.
body:
WIP Mod!

So ever wanted to grow some Jelly Babies? Well this mod will allow you to. Find some grass and punch it. You will get some Jelly Seeds. Grow them in a farm like you would wheat and after some time you will be able to harvest it and get Jelly Babies to use or eat? How could you eat them? 

![JellyCrops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad16db98bc71b3e501976e924c78e8daa7154997.png)

Is that not enough? Well go find some Slime balls and you can take those and craft them into a new item called Jelly. Jelly in itself is just a food item but it isn't the greatest or even good.

Jelly Babies are a little better for food and saturation wise than the Jelly but you do get too grow them so its a renewable food source.

If you want your world to have Jelly Babies then you have came to the right place. All Modpacks can use my mod.

![Jelly Babies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afb8912386e1f14871b17b569c41d8cd3491e4c0.png)

Current Jelly Babies: 
- Orange Jelly Baby
- Purple Jelly Baby

Other Features:
- Jelly
- Jelly Babies (Edible?)

Future Plans:
- More Seeds / Jelly Babies
- Building Blocks using Jelly and Jelly Babies
- Complex food crafting
- Jelly Babies in the world as mobs?
